## The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce

## The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce

164 followers

Visit website

AI Workflow Automation

ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens. [...] Promoted

Steven Cen

Ada.im

Ada.im

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋  
  
I'm Steven Cen, and today we're launching ClawTeams — an AI team platform  
built specifically for e-commerce operators.  
  
The frustration that led to this: we kept seeing smart sellers use AI tools and still  
end up doing all the coordination work themselves. They had AI assistants — but they  
still had to be the manager. That's exhausting.  
  
So we built ClawTeams around a different idea:  
→ You set the goal. The AI Team Lead manages the rest.

Get 800 bonus credits ($8 value) with your first top-up of any amount. No minimum required.

We'd love your feedback — especially from sellers who've tried other AI tools and hit  
walls. What made you give up on them? What would make an AI team actually useful? [...] Overview

results.title: ClawTeams: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce | Product Hunt | Steven Cen
results.content:
# Steven Cen’s Post

View profile for Steven Cen

Today marks an exciting milestone as ClawTeams.AI goes live on Product Hunt.
We developed ClawTeams after observing the challenges faced by e-commerce founders who often juggle multiple roles, from copywriting to customer service and market analysis, leading to burnout.
ClawTeams allows you to create an AI team from just a single sentence, enabling you to concentrate on business growth rather than managing every task yourself.
Your support through an upvote on Product Hunt and your honest feedback would be greatly appreciated.
PH Link:

results.title: All Claw | The Claw Ecosystem Directory
results.content:
### LinkFoxClaw

Tools & Extensions

LinkFoxClaw is the AI-powered data-clawing and operations assistant for cross-border e-commerce sellers. It extracts real-time data, performs intelligent product selection and competitor research, and delivers automated reports across Amazon, TikTok Shop, Temu, Shopify, and more.

ai-agentecommercedata-clawproduct-researchcompetitor-analysisautomation

### Desktop & Mobile Clients

Native applications for Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android.

View more

### PokeClaw

Desktop & Mobile Clients

PokeClaw (also known as PocketClaw) is an open-source Android app that brings the first fully on-device AI agent capable of autonomously controlling your phone using Google's Gemma 4 model — no cloud, no API keys, and no internet required after setup. [...] ### ClawTeam

Tools & Extensions

ClawTeam turns solo AI agents into intelligent swarms that self-organize, divide labor, and deliver full automation from a single human command.

ai-agentsswarm-intelligencemulti-agentagent-orchestrationcliautomation

### OpenViking

Tools & Extensions

OpenViking is an open-source context database that organizes AI agent memory, resources, and skills using a filesystem paradigm for efficient hierarchical retrieval and self-evolving capabilities.

ai-agentscontext-managementragmemorypythonfilesystem

### OpenClaw WebUI

Tools & Extensions [...] ### JVS Claw

Desktop & Mobile Clients

JVS Claw is Alibaba Cloud's official mobile app that lets anyone deploy and run the viral OpenClaw agentic AI assistant on iOS or Android in minutes — no coding or technical setup required.

aiagentic-aimobile-appopenclawalibabaclawbot

### Violoop

Desktop & Mobile Clients

Violoop is the world’s first physical-level AI Operator hardware device from Bvio.ai that lets local AI agents autonomously control any PC through real USB HID keyboard/mouse simulation and HDMI screen capture — delivering secure, proactive 24/7 automation as your always-on digital employee.

ai-hardwarephysical-ai-operatorai-agentusb-hidlocal-npuautomation

### LobsterAI

Desktop & Mobile Clients

results.title: AI Solutions for eCommerce | Custom AI-Powered Retail Technology
results.content:
Our focus goes beyond implementation: we work to ensure that the AI-driven solutions fully align with your vision for growth, efficiency, and innovation across your entire eCommerce business.

### Flexibility

As project requirements shift and market circumstances change, our experts are fully prepared to adapt swiftly and efficiently to your evolving eCommerce needs.

We stay agile and responsive to evolving needs to ensure that your AI project remains on track and aligned with your goals. Our proactive approach guarantees consistent progress, even in the face of dynamic environments and shifting priorities.
